name: Arena Master
short_description: Arena Master is the upcoming arena/survival game for SteamVR (HTC Vive). Grab your weapons and prepare yourself to face the ultimate challenge in the gladiator's arena! Fight your way through swarms of enemies to ascend to glory. Can you become the Arena Master?
detailed_description:
Arena Master is the upcoming arena/survival game for SteamVR (HTC Vive). It's using Unreal Engine technology to bring you the best VR experience. Thanks to Epic, we are able to view amazing Infinity Blade assets in a whole new way, in virtual reality.

Grab your weapons and prepare yourself to face the ultimate challenge in the gladiator's arena! Fight your way through swarms of enemies to ascend to glory. Do you think you are the chosen one? Can you become the Arena Master?
about_the_game:
Arena Master is the upcoming arena/survival game for SteamVR (HTC Vive). It's using Unreal Engine technology to bring you the best VR experience. Thanks to Epic, we are able to view amazing Infinity Blade assets in a whole new way, in virtual reality.

Grab your weapons and prepare yourself to face the ultimate challenge in the gladiator's arena! Fight your way through swarms of enemies to ascend to glory. Do you think you are the chosen one? Can you become the Arena Master?
